01-history-timeline.title: Inspect git history
01-history-timeline.body: The git-backed NYPL workspace exposes the import commit through the local artifact-project history RPC.

02-revision-selected.title: Review revision provenance
02-revision-selected.body: Selecting a commit shows the author, deterministic timestamp, and Actor trailer that came from the git commit.

03-revision-diff.title: Inspect revision diff
03-revision-diff.body: The same history entry carries file changes from git and renders a schema-aware field diff for parsed YAML resources.
